Title: Red Wind Local Delivery Route
Description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Put together a multi-stop run that needs a pilot.

PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER)
     · Package <EM4>#~mission(Item1|SerialNumber)</EM4> from the <EM4>~mission(Pickup1|Address)</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#~mission(Item2|SerialNumber)</EM4> from the <EM4>~mission(Pickup2|Address)</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#~mission(Item3|SerialNumber)</EM4> from the <EM4>~mission(Pickup3|Address)</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#~mission(Item4|SerialNumber)</EM4> from the <EM4>~mission(Pickup4|Address)</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#~mission(Item5|SerialNumber)</EM4> from the <EM4>~mission(Pickup5|Address)</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)
     · Package <EM4>#~mission(Item1|SerialNumber)</EM4> to the <EM4>~mission(Dropoff1|Address)</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#~mission(Item2|SerialNumber)</EM4> to the <EM4>~mission(Dropoff2|Address)</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#~mission(Item3|SerialNumber)</EM4> to the <EM4>~mission(Dropoff3|Address)</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#~mission(Item4|SerialNumber)</EM4> to the <EM4>~mission(Dropoff4|Address)</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#~mission(Item5|SerialNumber)</EM4> to the <EM4>~mission(Dropoff5|Address)</EM4> 

Make sure your ship's got the space for all these pickups. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along. 

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)
DisplayDescription:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Put together a multi-stop run that needs a pilot.

PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER)
     · Package <EM4>#[Item1|SerialNumber]</EM4> from the <EM4>[Pickup1|Address]</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#[Item2|SerialNumber]</EM4> from the <EM4>[Pickup2|Address]</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#[Item3|SerialNumber]</EM4> from the <EM4>[Pickup3|Address]</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#[Item4|SerialNumber]</EM4> from the <EM4>[Pickup4|Address]</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#[Item5|SerialNumber]</EM4> from the <EM4>[Pickup5|Address]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)
     · Package <EM4>#[Item1|SerialNumber]</EM4> to the <EM4>[Dropoff1|Address]</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#[Item2|SerialNumber]</EM4> to the <EM4>[Dropoff2|Address]</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#[Item3|SerialNumber]</EM4> to the <EM4>[Dropoff3|Address]</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#[Item4|SerialNumber]</EM4> to the <EM4>[Dropoff4|Address]</EM4>
     · Package <EM4>#[Item5|SerialNumber]</EM4> to the <EM4>[Dropoff5|Address]</EM4> 

Make sure your ship's got the space for all these pickups. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along. 

[Contractor|SignOff]

Contractor|SignOff: DO NOT TAKE THIS CONTRACT - unless you are reliable. Red Wind has a reputation that our clients trust and for good reason.

BE AWARE - in addition for being known as a dependable shipping service, Red Wind is also known for tracking down people who double cross us. If you're looking for an easy 'soft grab', we ain't it. Trustworthy pilots only.
TO ALL VETS - Red Wind appreciates your service to our Empire! Your struggles mean our freedom!
WE ARE EQUAL OPPORTUNITY - Red Wind Linehaul is and always has been an equal opportunity contractor. If you think you can do a good job for us, then by all means sign up.
TRUST GOES TWO WAYS - By taking this contract you are pledging not to screw us over, and Red Wind Linehaul pledges to treat you the same.
CELEBRATING 35 YEARS - Red Wind Linehaul is proud to have provided reliable shipment and delivery services for 35 years. To our loyal customers and dedicated contractors, we thank you!
Itinerary:
DELIVERY ITINERARY

PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER)
     · Package #[item1|serialnumber] from [Pickup1|Address]
     · Package #[item2|serialnumber] from [Pickup2|Address]
     · Package #[item3|serialnumber] from [Pickup3|Address]

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver ALL packages to [Dropoff1|Address]
